text:
There lived a cat named Whiskers. Whiskers lived in a condo building filled with cats. One day, Whiskers heard something shuffling near his garden. It was something new.

Whiskers darted outside. There stood a mysterious elderly woman with a sparkling brooch on her lap.

"Oh dear," she sighed. "A lonely tabby's meowy mourning." They got along famously, she teaching Whiskers tricks.

Then one day, the brooch glowed. "Come meet my guardian angel," she said.

A tiny cat appeared, wearing the same brooch. "Liberator," it chuckled. "I freed your human."

Whiskers was amazed—but cautious. They spent some nights hopping around.

After months, the guardian revealed how she could fly. Whiskers became her pilot.

Together, they flew around the city, helping lost cats and cheering up birds.

One bright spring morning, they returned to the condo. Whiskers didn’t
